## 2. Scope note
This is an early-stage residential subdivision screening for a site in Sunshine Coast LGA. It is not legal advice, survey advice, or a formal town planning determination.

## 6. Disclaimer

Any planning controls, overlays, lot size thresholds, servicing issues, access requirements, environmental constraints, and prior application implications must be verified through authoritative source documents and relevant professional advice before acquisition or development decisions are made.
